meta.description: Agents MUST query this before making architectural choices. If no entry exists, ESCALATE TO HUMAN. Constraints with 'enforcement' field indicate Tier 1 automated checks.

stateManagement.rationale: Lightweight, event-driven, integrated with PAPI network model

eventEmitter.rationale: Custom implementation with lazy init, dispose support, and subscription tracking

asyncCoordination.rationale: Mutex for exclusive execution, AsyncVariable for promise-based sync with timeout

serialization.rationale: Handles null↔undefined conversion for cross-process communication

logging.rationale: Process-aware, file + console output, integrates with Electron

notAllowed: plain Error objects across process boundaries
errorTypes.rationale: Serializable with version tracking, preserves stack traces

uiComponentLibrary.rationale: Custom design system with accessibility via Radix

cssFramework.choice: Tailwind CSS with tw- prefix classes
cssFramework.rationale: Consistent theming, performance, enforced by ESLint PNX011

bundler.choice: Webpack for Electron app, Vite for library packages
bundler.rationale: Webpack integrated with Electron Builder, Vite for modern lib builds

concurrency.choice: Interlocked for atomic counters/flags, lock for multi-operation atomicity, ConcurrentDictionary for simple key-value

when.lock: Multiple operations required to update shared state (REQUIRED for atomicity)
when.concurrentDictionary: Simple key-value access without additional atomicity requirements

notAllowed: ConcurrentDictionary without lock when atomicity needed across multiple operations
concurrency.rationale: If concurrent calls require more than a single operation to update shared state, you MUST lock to achieve atomicity

resourceDisposal.choice: Standard IDisposable pattern with bool _isDisposed flag

customExceptions.choice: Record-style with structured properties (ProjectId, BookNum, etc.)

networkTimeouts.choice: 30 seconds default, NetworkTimeoutAttribute for per-method override

asyncSyncBridge.when: Bridging synchronous ParatextData API with async PAPI

jsonConverters.when: Domain objects crossing process boundaries (VerseRef, Comments, Inventory, etc.)

statelessService.when: Pure utilities, logging, formatting, stateless helpers
statelessService.rationale: Simpler, tree-shakeable, no this binding issues

statefulService.when: Services requiring lifecycle management (network, data providers)

processSpecificService.rationale: Lazy loading, process detection at runtime

dataSubscription.rationale: Matches C# DataProvider pattern, integrated with PAPI

reactComponentStyle.rationale: Modern React, simpler testing, cleaner code

dataSubscription.when: Data that changes over time and multiple consumers need to subscribe

individualCommands.rationale: Simpler than NetworkObject for small command sets; InitializeAsync() called in Program.cs

commandAggregation.rationale: Aggregates related commands into single network-addressable object

initializationSequencing.use: Dependency-aware ordering with Task.WhenAll for independent operations
initializationSequencing.rationale: Services depend on earlier initializations; parallel registration for independent providers

registeredMethodThreadSafety.use: Lock all registered methods for the network object or data provider
registeredMethodThreadSafety.when: Any registered method is not thread safe
registeredMethodThreadSafety.rationale: Registered methods are called concurrently from PAPI; lock shared state to ensure thread safety

doubleCheckedLocking.when: Factory patterns with cached instances (e.g., ParatextProjectDataProviderFactory)
doubleCheckedLocking.rationale: Minimizes lock contention for existing entries

logicPlacement.use: C# process (c-sharp/) for logic not available in ParatextData.dll
logicPlacement.when: Business logic discovered outside ParatextData during Phase 1
notAllowed: TypeScript for business logic that needs ParatextData access
logicPlacement.rationale: Direct ParatextData.dll access, same language as PT9

noNull.rationale: Use undefined instead of null; null reserved for external APIs only

noInlineStyles.rationale: Use Tailwind tw- prefix classes only

noTraceDebug.rationale: C#: Use Console.WriteLine instead of System.Diagnostics.Trace/Debug

oneTypePerFile.exception: A record type used exclusively by another record type may share the same file
oneTypePerFile.rationale: C#: Only one type per file (exception: exclusively-used records share file with primary record)

namespaceMatchesDirectory.rationale: C#: Namespace must match directory structure (Paranext.DataProvider.{Directory})

noTupleReturnTypes.rationale: C#: DataProvider/NetworkObject methods cannot return tuples (serialize as {} over JSON-RPC)

concreteReturnTypes.rationale: C#: DataProvider/NetworkObject methods must return concrete types, not object/dynamic

fileScopedNamespaces.rationale: C#: Always use 'namespace X;' (file-scoped), not 'namespace X { }' (block-style). Enforce via .editorconfig: csharp_style_namespace_declarations = file_scoped:error
